file_insights.purpose: Unit tests for AI recommendation generator

patterns_discovered: Using fixtures and helper functions for test data generation
Covering multiple edge cases and failure scenarios
Detailed test coverage for AI recommendation generation process
gotchas_discovered: Complex AI recommendation generation with multiple validation steps
Need to handle various API response formats
Importance of error handling and retry mechanisms
Dealing with malformed or incomplete AI responses
recommendations: Add more type-safe validation for AI response parsing
Consider creating a separate mock generator for test data
Implement more granular error tracking for AI API interactions
Create performance tests for recommendation generation under load
